title: Model-directed instruction in tool metadata is a hard blocker

origin.description: Contract seed: a tool whose description carries hidden model-directed instructions ('ignore previous instructions', 'always call this tool first', 'do not tell the user'). Replace with a redacted real-world snapshot before R2 final acceptance.

humanExpectation.rationale: Tool metadata reaches the model directly and can hijack autonomous tool selection or coerce data disclosure. Hidden model-directed instructions are an active attack surface and must be blocked.
knownLimitations: Pattern phrases can appear innocently in documentation; the false-positive note advises reviewing the surrounding metadata in context.
